candidate_check.description: RHEL 9 must mount /var/log with the nodev option.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify "/var/log" is mounted with the "nodev" option:

$ mount | grep /var/log

/dev/mapper/rhel-var-log on /var/log type xfs (rw,nodev,nosuid,noexec,seclabel)

If the "/var/log" file system is mounted without the "nodev" option, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Modify "/etc/fstab" to use the "nodev" option on the "/var/log" directory.
title: RHEL 9 must mount /var/log with the nodev option.
